creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

No point in keeping this open any longer. I've talked to half a dozen of devs 
and admins and nothing happened so far. Everytime the archiving procedures run 
on hub.freebsd.org new corrupted archives get created and messages *do* get lost 
forever. But apparently people don't care ...
